'''Jar'Kai''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Atrisia/Legends|Atrisia]].

The origins of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat form]] [[Jar'Kai/Legends|Jar'Kai]] were said to come from here, where the first [[Jar'Kai dueling saber]] was built.

{{City-stub}}
